title: Runnix
description: Secure, isolated code execution service with JWT authentication, user-based rate limiting, Docker + gVisor sandbox, and comprehensive monitoring.

title: Termchat
description: Minimal anonymous terminal chatrooms built for quick collaboration, debugging sessions, pair programming, temporary communities, and realtime internet-native communication directly from the terminal. No signup, no browser tabs, just one command to create or join a room instantly.

title: SwiftWrite
description: Local-first, cross-platform Flutter writing app with Markdown support, optional cloud sync, and code execution.
highlights: Optional sync without giving up local control

title: WeDroid
description: A full-stack club management application for coordinating members, events, and internal updates without burying the simple workflows.

title: Steal CSS
description: A browser-facing experiment that extracts a page's styling, mutates it into a stranger design language, and shows the transformed result.
highlights: Turns static CSS into a playful design remix
Ships with a live public demo
